transcript.speaker: user-audio
transcript.text: 私 の 言っ てる こと を 英語 に 翻訳 でき ます か ?

transcript.speaker: agent-audio-translation
transcript.text: Can you translate what I'm saying into English?

transcript.speaker: agent-audio-translation
transcript.text: 遅いですね。 もっと早くできますよ。 何かお急ぎの話題はありますか?

transcript.speaker: user-chat
transcript.text: Summarize the last 5 minutes of our meeting.

transcript.speaker: agent-audio-translation
transcript.text: The last 5 minutes have primarily consisted of you testing the interpretation speed and asking for confirmation that you are being understood. We also attempted a brief summary earlier.
